# Nicos Savva (Business Analytics)

I am a professor at the London Business School where I have been teaching analytics and data science to MBA and leadership audiences for almost 20 years Now, like many of you, I think artificial intelligence is going to be transformational, not just for tech companies, but for how we all work.
